# Geotecnia1 — Maringa

> Geotechnical engineering services in Maringa, Brasil.

## Services

## Contact
- Website: https://maringa.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Maringa, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
